title: The Overgrown Gates
lines: The massive steel gates of the city zoo loom out of the shadows, their once-proud archway now strangled by thick, bioluminescent vines that pulse with a rhythmic green light.
A flickering neon-green terminal kiosk greets you at the turnstile, its screen showing a static-distorted welcome message from a world that ended years ago.
Beyond the gates, the silence of the city is replaced by a high-frequency hum and the distant, impossible sounds of the wild.

options.desc: 1. Step through the turnstile and enter the park
2. Search the ticket booths for supplies
3. Retreat back toward the safety of the village square
